allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\nande\\Desktop\\GS cursor\\backups" -Force | Select-Object Name, @{N='Size\(MB\)';E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1MB,2\)}}, LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($slugs = @\('creme-anti-verrue','poudre-pousse-cheveux','coffret-versace','coffret-boxer-homme','creme-anti-lipome','creme-anti-lipome-tk','chaussette-homme','creme-anti-cerne'\); foreach \($s in $slugs\) { $r = curl.exe -s -o NUL -w "%{http_code} -> %{redirect_url}" "https://obrille.com/$s"; Write-Host "  $s -> $r" })
